theoremName: augmented trace quotient two-sided bounds theorem
statement: The augmented trace quotient norms satisfy both the upper recovery bound and the lower representative-compactness bound.

quotientUpperBoundInputStatus.label: trace quotient upper bound input
quotientUpperBoundInputStatus.reason: The quotient limsup theorem supplies the recovery upper bound.

quotientLowerBoundInputStatus.label: trace quotient lower bound input
quotientLowerBoundInputStatus.reason: The quotient liminf theorem supplies the representative lower bound.

twoSidedQuotientBoundsStatus.label: two-sided trace quotient bounds
twoSidedQuotientBoundsStatus.reason: The upper and lower quotient bounds identify the limiting transported trace quotient norm from both sides.

proof: Import the trace quotient limsup theorem.
Import the trace quotient liminf theorem.
Use the two inequalities as the two-sided quotient bound package.
